creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
maintainer-feedback (+) is only required when requested (?) first.

While attachments for QA logs are no longer required, they are preferred over remote URL references. For future issues just confirm that QA has passed similar to:

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: <archs>, <versions>, <options> tested)

Thank you for your ongoing contributions Zsolt!
